languages.text: Колоссальный зал оказался чужацким подобием музея. Лорду-капитану предстоит отыскать следы Себериана и вернуть меч-реликвию.

traits.locale_text: Колоссальный зал оказался чужацким подобием музея. Лорду-капитану предстоит отыскать следы Себериана и вернуть меч-реликвию.

languages.text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.
languages.original_text: Колоссальный зал оказался чужацким подобием музея. Лорду-капитану предстоит отыскать следы Себериана и вернуть меч-реликвию.

traits.locale_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic-blade.
The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic-blade.
The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.
The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

languages.text: Die riesige Halle hat sich als Xenosversion eines Museums entpuppt. Der Lord Captain muss nun Seberians Spuren finden und die Reliktklinge an sich bringen.
languages.original_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

traits.locale_text: Die riesige Halle hat sich als Xenosversion eines Museums entpuppt. Der Lord Captain muss nun Seberians Spuren finden und die Reliktklinge an sich bringen.

languages.text: La gigantesque salle s'est révélé la parodie xénos d'un musée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit maintenant suivre les traces de Seberian et s'emparer de sa lame.
languages.original_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

traits.locale_text: La gigantesque salle s'est révélé la parodie xénos d'un musée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} doit maintenant suivre les traces de Seberian et s'emparer de sa lame.

languages.text: 这座巨型展厅原来是异形仿照博物馆弄出来的拙劣赝品。舰长大人必须找到塞贝里安的踪迹，夺回那把宝剑圣物。
languages.original_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

traits.locale_text: 这座巨型展厅原来是异形仿照博物馆弄出来的拙劣赝品。舰长大人必须找到塞贝里安的踪迹，夺回那把宝剑圣物。

languages.text: El colosal salón ha resultado ser una imitación xenos de un museo. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe encontrar el rastro de Seberian para recuperar la espada reliquia.
languages.original_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

traits.locale_text: El colosal salón ha resultado ser una imitación xenos de un museo. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán debe encontrar el rastro de Seberian para recuperar la espada reliquia.

languages.text: 巨大なホールはエイリアンのような博物館であることが判明。ロード・キャプテンはセベリアンの痕跡を見つけ、剣の遺物を取り戻さなければならない。
languages.original_text: The colossal hall turns out to be an alien-like museum. The Lord Captain must find the traces of Seberian and recover the sword relic.

languages.text: Devasa salonun, zeno taklidi bir müze olduğu ortaya çıktı. Lord Kaptan şimdi Seberian'ın izlerini ortaya çıkarmalı ve yadigâr kılıcı geri almalı.
languages.original_text: The colossal hall has proved to be a xenos mockery of a museum. The Lord Captain must now uncover traces of Seberian and reclaim the relic blade.

traits.locale_text: Devasa salonun, zeno taklidi bir müze olduğu ortaya çıktı. Lord Kaptan şimdi Seberian'ın izlerini ortaya çıkarmalı ve yadigâr kılıcı geri almalı.
